title: Govern final release freeze through a Work Item
outOfScope: unrelated product code, dependencies, SBOM, and provenance changes

sources.reason: Authoritative candidate and publication lifecycle state.
Release metadata and source-bound evidence references.
Canonical release source and evidence digests.
PR lifecycle and review evidence requirements.

riskAssessment.reason: Deterministic metadata-only freeze and governance-budget correction; publication remains out of scope.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the complete Contract/Preflight/PR/merge/close lifecycle; no publication is performed by this Work Item.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The canonical candidate freeze is generated only after Contract and Preflight pass, and the source-bound release metadata is internally consistent.
The archive-growth budget is raised from 509 to 510 as part of this functional release-freeze Work Item, with an explicit repayment record; no budget-only Work Item is created.

Candidate release consistency, supply-chain evidence, preparation-mode distribution, and all declared AI checks pass before PR; final release preflight is rerun only after ai-close-work-item and default-base synchronization.
The Work Item completes ai-finish/archive, PR review and merge, ai-close-work-item, branch deletion, and default-base synchronization before any publication decision.
guidelines: Use the canonical release finalizer and release preflight commands; do not hand-edit generated release evidence.
Keep template-engineering changes scoped to this repository; do not infer adopter-project behavior.
Do not publish a tag or provider assets from this Work Item.

intent.problem: A direct post-merge release-freeze commit was rejected by the repository pull-request rule, and its PR failed because it was not represented by an archived Work Item. Final release freeze must therefore be governed as a real functional Work Item.
constraints: Run candidate freeze while this Work Item is active, then complete the full PR and ai-close-work-item lifecycle.
Preserve the distinction between candidate preparation and final publication; publication and provider assets remain out of scope.
Budget, formatting, scope, and required checks are hard preflight gates before expensive CI.
intent.rationale: Make the repository's release-freeze process obey the same auditable lifecycle as every other governed change and prevent another untracked protected-main mutation.

rawUserRequest: Complete the approved Conditional GO remediation plan and release workflow without skipping Work Items. Every Work Item must pass Contract/Preflight/PR/merge/ai-close-work-item and branch cleanup. Do not create a separate budget-only Work Item; fix process problems at root and stop publication when a gate fails.

declaredIntent.summary: Govern the final release freeze as a complete Work Item and harden its budget/preflight boundary without publishing.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the complete plan and release lifecycle, including governance-file corrections.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

budgetImpact.reason: Archive growth is functional lifecycle evidence for this Work Item, not a standalone budget reservation.
